channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: AI vs Solo SaaS: Costs, speed, rewrite risks
item.description: AI-first SaaS stacks cut build time 80% but can cost 7.6x more at 5k users. See the real cost, latency, and DX numbers from two solo founder projects.

item.title: Failed AI wrappers 2026: what the survivors did right
item.description: Cut AI wrapper costs 80% and avoid silent breaks with drift detection — the 2026 survival guide for wrapper businesses

item.title: 8 AI tools that let us outrun Nairobi’s rivals
item.description: Cut engineering time 35% with AI tools — GitHub Copilot Enterprise, Cursor IDE, and Amazon Q Developer deliver real latency and cost wins for Nairobi teams.

item.title: TLS 1.3 and post-quantum crypto: 200% latency spike
item.description: Post-quantum TLS handshake latency spiked 200% in 2026 — how we fixed it with OpenSSL 3.2.1, Node.js 20 LTS, and a 62% speedup.

item.title: Starlink 4G fallback: serve pages under 800ms
item.description: Cut page load time 60% on 4G in East Africa with Next.js 15, Redis 7.2, and a 120 kB client bundle — the exact steps teams used when Starlink lit up the region.

item.title: Flip your dev-tool sales cycle in 2026
item.description: Cut sales cycle from 42 days to 8 days with a one-liner that produces a PDF with three ROI numbers — how we rebuilt our dev tool funnel in 2026.

item.title: Skip the VPN: zero-trust for under $100
item.description: Two months later, we moved to Tailscale and Cloudflare Tunnel—both costing $0 for our scale—and cut our infrastructure spend by 80%.

item.title: Postgres 17 buried Redis, S3, cron
item.description: Cut stack costs 88% with Postgres 17 caching, cron jobs, and blob storage — latency benchmarks, migration steps, and the 1 mistake we made

item.title: Nairobi SaaS infra costs: real 2026 stack
item.description: Cut Nairobi SaaS infra costs 40% with ARM Lambda, Redis, and multi-region failover — concrete numbers and the stack we actually run in 2026.

item.title: AI wrote 80% of my SaaS in 6 weeks — here’s what broke
item.description: Launched a SaaS in 6 weeks using AI for 80% of the code — the real breakdown: costs, bugs, and what actually went wrong in production with tools like FastAPI, Go, and Redis 7.2.

item.title: Monitor AI like a model, not a machine
item.description: They’re built for systems where the code path is deterministic: if you call endpoint A with input X, you get response Y 99.9% of the time.

item.title: LLM output metrics that actually move the needle
item.description: Cut LLM costs 40% and improve fact accuracy 9% with four production metrics — p95 latency, cost per 1000, structured correctness, and user retention delta. Real 90-day numbers from a Nairobi fintech app.

item.title: LLM structured output: JSON mode fails at scale
item.description: Cut API latency 93% and token waste 62% by enforcing strict JSON schemas with vLLM — the real way to get reliable structured outputs from LLMs

item.title: 3 vibe-coding tricks that kill MVPs — and 5 tools that
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with FastAPI + Redis 7.2 — connection pooling, schema validation, and the migration step most teams skip.

item.title: Pinecone? No thanks — pgvector handled 1M v/s
item.description: Cut vector search costs 85% by replacing Pinecone with Postgres 16 + pgvector — real benchmarks, code, and the exact SQL to migrate today

item.title: NDPR 2026 broke fintech APIs
item.description: The sandbox logs showed our average response time had climbed from 180 ms to 420 ms under load, which triggered CBN’s new "real-time risk scoring"…

item.title: Maintain 40% AI code: two battle-tested paths
item.description: Cut AI-patch rollbacks 83% with auto-gate workflows — semgrep 1.65, pytest 7.4, and llm-gatekeeper 0.4.2 rules that catch 87% of regressions before they ship.

item.title: Compound Nairobi: 6 dev income streams 2026
item.description: Earn KES 50k/month without SaaS — 7 Nairobi-tested ways using Python, Node.js, AWS Lambda, and GitHub Sponsors with real KES numbers and code samples.

item.title: Land a $45k remote job? Africa’s 2026 map
item.description: Land remote jobs paying $45k+ with Africa’s 2026 salary map and tech hubs—plus tools, code, and negotiation scripts that actually work.

item.title: AI benchmarking: 3 mistakes we made first
item.description: Cut AI inference cost 32% without hurting conversions — real latency benchmarks, CPI scoring, and the shadow-traffic mistake most teams make.
